## reference · WCAG Animation from Interactions

* The Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) provide guidance on accessibility for web content.
* Animation triggered by user interactions must not last more than 3 seconds.
* Users must be able to pause or stop animations that last more than 5 seconds.
* Animations should not cause vestibular disorders.

Sources: https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG21/Understanding/animation-from-interactions.html
